== Notes for [[Item:Q104442|Q104442]] ==

* Reference: [https://www.ancestry.com/family-tree/person/tree/11972161/person/232009021949 Ancestry Genealogy] - [https://www.geni.com/projects/SmartCopy/18783 SmartCopy]: ''Sep 12 2018, 16:25:45 UTC''

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000007847541840

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
